chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Crl. Miscellaneous Application No.S-499 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 17.10.2025 Ms.Safa Hisbani, Advocate for applicant Mr.Muhammad Hassan Chang, Advocate for respondents No.5 and 6 None is present on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. The same was the case on the last date of hearing. It appears that the applicant Maheen Noor, is aggrieved by the orders passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace/Additional District & Sessions Judge, Matli, wherein police protection was directed for the applicant. The applicant contends that no such protection has been extended to her. It is not within the domain of this Court under Section 561-A Cr.P.C. to regulate compliance with the order passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace. No case is made out for intervention in the impugned order; the same is dismissed in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
